topWPAPlays.description: Josh Naylor hits a grand slam (7) to right field. Jhonny Pereda scores. Cole Young scores. Julio Rodríguez scores.
Mariners challenged (timing play), call on the field was overturned: Samuel Basallo flies into a double play, center fielder Julio Rodríguez to second baseman Ryan Bliss. Blaze Alexander out at 2nd.
Jhonny Pereda challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Pete Alonso called out on strikes.
Colton Cowser grounds out, second baseman Ryan Bliss to first baseman Josh Naylor.
Jhonny Pereda singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Colton Cowser. Dominic Canzone to 3rd.
Jonathan Aranda singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jarren Duran. Austin Slater scores.
Isiah Kiner-Falefa grounds out, third baseman Junior Caminero to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.
Marcelo Mayer homers (3) on a fly ball to right center field.

Jonathan Aranda grounds into a double play, second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa to shortstop Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Junior Caminero to 3rd. Ryan Vilade out at 2nd. Jonathan Aranda out at 1st.
Yandy Díaz homers (12) on a fly ball to left field.
Angel Martínez homers (10) on a fly ball to right center field. David Fry scores.
Jazz Chisholm Jr. grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Cody Bellinger out at 2nd. Jazz Chisholm Jr. out at 1st.

Cody Bellinger singles on a ground ball to left fielder Steven Kwan. Ali Sánchez scores. Ben Rice scores. Max Schuemann out at 3rd on the throw, left fielder Steven Kwan to third baseman José Ramírez to shortstop Brayan Rocchio.
Ben Rice singles on a line drive to right fielder Angel Martínez. Trent Grisham to 3rd.
Paul Goldschmidt homers (8) on a fly ball to left field. Ben Rice scores.
Adolis García homers (7) on a fly ball to left center field. Bryson Stott scores.
Yohendrick Piñango doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Adolis García. Yohendrick Piñango to 3rd. Yohendrick Piñango advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder Adolis García.
J.T. Realmuto grounds into a double play, third baseman Kazuma Okamoto to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Alec Bohm out at 2nd. J.T. Realmuto out at 1st.
Ernie Clement homers (7) on a fly ball to left center field.
Vladimir Guerrero Jr. strikes out on a foul tip.
Christian Walker singles on a line drive to center fielder Mike Trout. Jeremy Peña scores.
Zach Neto homers (13) on a fly ball to left center field.
Logan O'Hoppe doubles (5) on a ground ball to left fielder LaMonte Wade Jr. Nick Madrigal scores. Trey Mancini scores.
Cam Smith doubles (10) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Wade Meckler. Brice Matthews scores.

Angels challenged (home-plate collision), call on the field was upheld: Angels challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Jose Siri singles on a line drive to left fielder Brice Matthews. Mike Trout out at home on the throw, left fielder Brice Matthews to catcher Collin Price. Jose Siri to 2nd.
Gavin Sheets doubles (11) on a sharp line drive to left fielder JJ Bleday. Xander Bogaerts scores.
Xander Bogaerts hits a ground-rule double (4) on a fly ball to left-center field.
Sal Stewart singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jackson Merrill. JJ Bleday scores.
Edwin Arroyo flies into a double play, left fielder Samad Taylor to catcher Freddy Fermin. Matt McLain out at home.
Freddy Fermin homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field.
Daylen Lile singles on a line drive to center fielder Jonah Cox. CJ Abrams scores.
CJ Abrams singles on a line drive to center fielder Jonah Cox. Luis García Jr. scores. José Tena scores.
Bryce Eldridge strikes out swinging.
Matt Chapman singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile. Jung Hoo Lee scores. Bryce Eldridge to 2nd.
Bryce Eldridge doubles (8) on a soft line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile. Jung Hoo Lee scores.
Jonah Heim homers (4) on a fly ball to right field.
Andrew Vaughn doubles (9) on a line drive to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom. William Contreras scores. Blake Perkins scores.
William Contreras homers (6) on a fly ball to center field. Christian Yelich scores. Brice Turang scores.
Shea Langeliers strikes out swinging.
Jeff McNeil strikes out swinging.
